IEEE TPS 2025

The 7th IEEE International Conference on Trust, Privacy and Security in Intelligent Systems, and Applications

Nov. 11-14, 2025, Pittsburgh, PA, USA

Co-located with IEEE CIC 2025 and IEEE CogMI 2025

Sponsorships

  • Home
  • Sponsorships

Call for Sponsorships

IEEE TPS welcomes and highly appreciates sponsorship support from interested Industry, Government or Academia. Various levels of sponsorships and benefits are as follows. If you have interest beyond or outside these packages please do contact us (James Joshi && Danda Rawat: jjoshi@pitt.edu, danda.rawat@howard.edu).

Based on the amount you donate, you will qualify for one of the following TPS Corporate Sponsorship levels (in US dollars or equivalent):

Sponsorship
Level 		Sponsorship Amount Main Sponsor Benefits
Platinum >= $10,000
  • Special recognition as Platinum Supporter at the conference banquet
  • Poster (from Company/Institution) display indicating Platinum Sponsor at the registration booth/area
  • Two complimentary conference registrations for the conference
  • Any number of company/institution-provided items in conference bag
Gold >= $5,000
  • Recognized as Gold Supporter at the banquet
  • One complimentary conference registrations for the conference
  • Display space during the conference
  • Two company/institution-provided items in conference bag
Silver >=$2,500
  • Recognized as Silver Supporter at the banquet
  • One company/institution-provided item in conference bag
In- kind Sponsor support of a particular activity at the conference
  • We offer the opportunity to sponsor specific events and activities, e.g. student grants, coffee breaks, lunch, reception, or conference banquet. In these cases the sponsor name is prominently displayed during the event and an explicit "thank you" is mentioned at the welcome note and the banquet of the event.

Platinum

>= $10,000

  • Special recognition as Platinum Supporter at the conference banquet
  • Poster (from Company/Institution) display indicating Platinum Sponsor at the registration booth/area
  • Two complimentary conference registrations for the conference
  • Any number of company/institution-provided items in conference bag

Gold

>= $5,000

  • Recognized as Gold Supporter at the banquet
  • One complimentary conference registrations for the conference
  • Display space during the conference
  • Two company/institution-provided items in conference bag

Silver

>= $2,500

  • Recognized as Silver Supporter at the banquet
  • One company/institution-provided item in conference bag

In-kind Sponsor

support of a particular activity at the conference

  • We offer the opportunity to sponsor specific events and activities, e.g. student grants, coffee breaks, lunch, reception, or conference banquet. In these cases the sponsor name is prominently displayed during the event and an explicit "thank you" is mentioned at the welcome note and the banquet of the event.

If you are interested to become a sponsor for IEEE TPS 2025 in any of these capacities or in other ways, please contact the conference co-chairs or the sponsorship co-chairs.

 

We look forward to seeing you soon!

Follow us on Facebook.

Financial Sponsors


Gold Corporate Sponsors

Co-located Workshops

  • 📎 IEEE Workshop on Security and Resiliency of Critical Infrastructure and Space Technologies (IEEE SR-CIST 2025)
  • 📎 IEEE Workshop on Trustworthy and Privacy-Preserving Human-AI Collaboration (IEEE TPHAC 2025)
  • 📎 Equitable & Inclusive Computing Workshop 2025 (EIC WORKSHOP 2025)
  • 📎 IEEE Workshop on Distributed, Secure, and Trustworthy Intelligence with LLMs (IEEE DISTILL 2025)
  • 📎 The Second IEEE Workshop on Quantum Intelligence, Learning and Security (QuILLS 2025)
  • 📎 The First International Workshop on Agentic Intelligence: Risks, Ethics, and Trust. (AIRET 2025)
  • 📎 The 1st IEEE Workshop on Healthcare and Medical Device Security, Privacy, Resilience, and Trust. (IEEE HMD-SPiRiT 2025)

Co-located Conferences

  • 📎 The 11th IEEE International Conference on Collaboration and Internet Computing (IEEE CIC 2025)
  • 📎 The 7th IEEE International Conference on Trust, Privacy and Security in Intelligent Systems, and Applications (IEEE TPS 2025)
  • 📎 The 7th IEEE International Conference on Cognitive Machine Intelligence (IEEE CogMI 2025)
